title: Regulatory Affairs Specialists
description: Coordinate and document internal regulatory processes, such as internal audits, inspections, license renewals, or registrations. May compile and prepare materials for submission to regulatory agencies.

tasks.text: Coordinate efforts associated with the preparation of regulatory documents or submissions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Communicate with regulatory agencies regarding pre-submission strategies, potential regulatory pathways, compliance test requirements, or clarification and follow-up of submissions under review.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare or direct the preparation of additional information or responses as requested by regulatory agencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate, prepare, or review regulatory submissions for domestic or international projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare or maintain technical files as necessary to obtain and sustain product approval.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interpret regulatory rules or rule changes and ensure that they are communicated through corporate policies and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine the types of regulatory submissions or internal documentation that are required in situations such as proposed device changes or labeling changes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate recall or market withdrawal activities as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise project teams on subjects such as premarket regulatory requirements, export and labeling requirements, or clinical study compliance issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review adverse drug reactions and file all related reports in accordance with regulatory agency guidelines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review product promotional materials, labeling, batch records, specification sheets, or test methods for compliance with applicable regulations and policies.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Identify relevant guidance documents, international standards, or consensus standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide technical review of data or reports to be incorporated into regulatory submissions to assure scientific rigor, accuracy, and clarity of presentation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Review clinical protocols to ensure collection of data needed for regulatory submissions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide pre-, ongoing, and post-inspection follow-up assistance to governmental inspectors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Maintain current knowledge base of existing and emerging regulations, standards, or guidance documents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend changes to company procedures in response to changes in regulations or standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in internal or external audits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Compile and maintain regulatory documentation databases or systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write or update standard operating procedures, work instructions, or policies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain and distribute updated information regarding domestic or international laws, guidelines, or standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or track quality metrics.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or conduct employee regulatory training.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend adjudication of product complaints.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine requirements applying to treatment, storage, shipment, or disposal of potentially hazardous production-related waste.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct the collection and preparation of laboratory samples as requested by regulatory agencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare responses to customer requests for information, such as product data, written regulatory affairs statements, surveys, or questionnaires.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Specialize in regulatory issues related to agriculture, such as the cultivation of green biotechnology crops or the post-market regulation of genetically altered crops.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine regulations or procedures related to the management, collection, reuse, recovery, or recycling of packaging waste.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine the legal implications of the production, supply, or use of ozone-depleting substances or equipment containing such substances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
